title: Fart Chambers
description: Changes the sounds and textures of Breeze, Wind Charge, trial spawner, vault into Farts in trial chambers. Perfect.
body:
![https://i.imgur.com/fH3h7my.png](https://i.imgur.com/fH3h7my.png)

The resource pack changes the **_sounds_** and **_textures_** of **Breeze**, **Wind Charge** into **_farts_**. Perfect.

_Also_ **since** update **1.5.0** changes some _**sounds**_ for **trial spawner** and **vault**.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/GWxshmnBtKw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

qq nerkin
